description_long: This is a two-story suburban house surrounded by a well-maintained yard with several large trees and neatly trimmed hedges. The house features a light-colored facade with a dark, multi-gabled roof and multiple symmetrically arranged windows. The front entryway is prominent, with a small porch and steps leading up to the main door, flanked by greenery. The property is enclosed by a low fence and includes a driveway leading to a detached garage on one side. The landscaping is lush, with a mix of tall coniferous trees and broad-leaved deciduous trees providing privacy and shade. The overall design is balanced and orderly, reflecting a traditional residential architectural style.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gabled roof, symmetrical windows, and a landscaped yard with trees and hedges. The property includes a driveway, detached garage, and a prominent front entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical windows, and lush landscaping with trees and hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, detached garage, and the row of coniferous trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional trees, and the continuation of the landscaped yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more of the yard, fencing, and the side elevation of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with small porch, steps, and flanking greenery; simple and traditional design.
